privileged_info_summary: This is an Odoo project management task with timesheet integration. The task requires creating a project named 'Westfield Manufacturing - ERP Implementation' with timesheets enabled. Four tasks must be created: (1) 'Discovery & Requirements Gathering' (14 days), (2) 'System Configuration & Customization' (45 days), (3) 'Data Migration' (60 days), (4) 'User Training & Go-Live Support' (90 days). The first task requires two specific timesheet entries: 4.0 hours for 'Initial stakeholder interviews' and 2.5 hours for 'Current process documentation review', totaling 6.5 hours. All 15 metadata claims are verified as correct and internally consistent.
